waivers.structural_basis: div.v:134 `default: state <= IDLE` — `state` is reg[1:0] with all 4 encodings defined (IDLE=0/WORK=1/FIXUP=2/DONE=3, div.v:31-34); the case default arm is unreachable (no 5th 2-bit value). Defensive synthesis-safety default.
waivers.stimulus_considered: all FSM states+arcs exercised (URG state 4/4, arc 6/6); no legal input reaches a 5th state value

waivers.structural_basis: md_op[2] never toggles to 0 in div.v: the divider receives only DIV-class opcodes (MD_DIV/MD_DIVU/MD_REM/MD_REMU, encodings 100..111, bit2=1); the core routes mul-class opcodes (bit2=0) to mul.v, not div.v. So md_op[2] is constant 1 at the divider interface.
waivers.stimulus_considered: all 4 div opcodes x sign x magnitude driven; mul-class opcodes are out of div.v's interface contract
